title: Subscription Cost Calculator
description: Estimate monthly and annual subscription spend across streaming, AI, cloud, and creator tools.
trendAngle: Consumers are trimming recurring AI, streaming, and creator-tool subscriptions.

inputs.label: Cloud and creator tools monthly cost

faq.question: What subscriptions should I include?
faq.answer: Include any recurring app, streaming, cloud, AI, creator, or membership payment.

faq.question: Is this financial advice?
faq.answer: No. It is a simple planning estimate to help you review recurring costs.

disclaimer: This calculator is for planning only and is not financial advice.
